name: 3D Translucent Glass Transformation

A soft, 3D translucent glass of the attached image with a frosty matte finish and detailed texture, original colors, centered on a light gray background, floats gently in space, soft shadows, natural lighting

## Reference Image
Need to upload a reference image of a physical object

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/azed_ai/status/1917948899098243407)

## Example Output
![3D Translucent Glass Transformation](/media/3d/3d-translucent-glass-transformation.webp)
description_en: An image-generation prompt that re-renders a reference object as a soft, frosted translucent glass version floating in space.
description_zh: 一个图像生成提示词，把参考物体重新渲染成悬浮在空间中的柔和磨砂半透明玻璃版本。
long_en: The prompt converts an uploaded object photo into a 3D translucent glass form with a frosty matte finish, original colors, soft shadows and natural lighting on a light gray background. It is a short, single-paragraph style transform.
long_zh: 提示词把上传的物体照片转换成 3D 半透明玻璃形态，带磨砂哑光质感、保留原色，置于浅灰背景上配柔和阴影与自然光，是一段简短的单段风格转换提示。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and uploading a reference object photo; no code execution.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并上传参考物体照片；不执行任何代码。
